plan.goal: Implement the protected repo .prism state signatures design from docs/PROTECTED_PRISM_STATE_SIGNATURES.md, covering signed protected streams, trust-bundle verification, fail-closed hydration, protected write-path enforcement, migration semantics, and validation coverage.
